title: Sweet Spot Training Isn't That Sweet | The Science Says You're Wasting Time | Gravel God
excerpt: Sweet Spot training is made up, makes you slower, and science hates it. The evidence for polarized training is clear. 88-94% FTP is a marketing trick.

title: Your Training App Doesn't Know Your Race Exists | Gravel God
excerpt: TrainerRoad and Zwift build you excellent fitness in a generic shape. Races are not generic. Where the climbing lands, when the selection happens, and what you can digest decide your day — and no algorithm reads a course profile.
